content: Certificate of Appreciation This is to certify that Gandhi Institute of Engineering and Technology, Gunupur is categorized as 'Band B' institution (rank between 26-50) in category of in Atal Ranking of Institutions on Innovation Achievement (ARIIA) 2020 th announced on 18 Aug 2020. ‘University & deemed to be University (Private-Self-Financed)’ Dr. Anil D Sahasrabudhe Chairman, AICTE Sh. Amit Khare Secretary (HE), MHRD Dr. Abhay Jere Chief Innovation Officer MHRD's Innovation Cell
